name: manage_device
description: Update a device's metadata such as its name or notes, change its configuration, or unclaim it from your account. Use PUT to update properties or DELETE to remove ownership.

parameters.name: deviceId
parameters.description: The unique ID of the device to manage.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: New display name for the device.

parameters.name: notes
parameters.example: Temperature sensor in the living room

body.name: living-room-sensor
body.notes: Temperature sensor in the living room

body.name: living-room-sensor
body.notes: Temperature sensor in the living room
